title: Police recorded knife-enabled robbery offences, to October 2025
body: "This release provides information from 7 police forces on the number of KER offences they have recorded up to October 2025. The 7 forces are: Avon and Somerset, Greater Manchester, Metropolitan, South Yorkshire, West Midlands, West Yorkshire and British Transport Police (England and Wales only).  The data is provisional and taken from live force systems. "
